original_hypothesis.title: LendingTerm.forgive() on Active Auction Permanently Blocks Auction Settlement and AuctionHouse Migration
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: LendingTerm.forgive() does not verify whether the loan is currently in an active auction (callTime != 0). If a governor calls forgive() on a loan that has been called and has an active auction, it sets closeTime, making onBid() revert (requires closeTime == 0). The auction in AuctionHouse can never complete, permanently inflating nAuctionsInProgress. This blocks setAuctionHouse() which requires nAuctionsInProgress == 0, preventing auction house migration and leaving collateral stuck.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: This is a state machine violation where forgive() creates an illegal state (loan closed while auction is active). While it requires GOVERNOR role, it's a code bug that could be triggered by legitimate governance actions during emergency situations.

proof_of_signal.pattern: forgive() checks borrowTime != 0 and closeTime == 0 but NOT callTime == 0; can close a loan in active auction

preconditions: GOVERNOR role (accessed via timelock in production)
A loan is in active auction (callTime != 0, closeTime == 0)
Governor calls forgive() on this loan

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: forgive sets closeTime > 0; onBid requires closeTime == 0; auction stuck forever
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: GOVERNOR calls forgive on loan in auction (possibly accidental during emergency)
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: nAuctionsInProgress permanently elevated; setAuctionHouse blocked; collateral locked

economic_questions: Can emergencyAction on AuctionHouse manually fix nAuctionsInProgress?
What is the value of collateral that could be permanently locked?
Could a compromised governor trigger this to freeze the auction system?
validation_requirements: Call loan, start auction, then forgive - verify auction.bid() reverts
Verify setAuctionHouse reverts due to nAuctionsInProgress > 0

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: DoS on auction system; collateral value locked

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: When a valuable loan is in auction
market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Blocks all future auction house upgrades; stuck collateral

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Check if any loans are currently in auction
investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Trace state machine through forgive-during-auction path

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
